hooks.command: input=$(cat); file_path=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -z "$file_path" ]; then exit 0; fi; if printf '%s' "$file_path" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env($|\.)' && ! printf '%s' "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.env\.example$'; then echo 'Blocked: .env files must not be created or edited (public repo). Use .env.example as the template.' >&2; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); file_path=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -z "$file_path" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$file_path" in *.py) if command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then black --quiet "$file_path"; fi; if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check --fix --quiet "$file_path" || true; fi ;; esac
